data.incident_description: On 12th April 2026, while I was driving on a public road, my vehicle was hit by another driver. The incident occurred during the day under normal driving conditions. I was driving carefully when the other vehicle suddenly collided with mine. The impact caused damage to my car, which I noticed immediately after stepping out to inspect it. No injuries were involved, but the vehicle sustained visible damage. The other driver was present at the scene when the incident occurred.
